name: Silhouette
summary: Information about silhouette curves that are generated from geometry (surfaces, brep faces, meshes)

methods.name: Compute(GeometryBase, SilhouetteType, ViewportInfo, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public static Silhouette[] Compute(GeometryBase geometry, SilhouetteType silhouetteType, ViewportInfo viewport, double tolerance, double angleToleranceRadians)
methods.summary: Compute silhouettes of a shape for a specified projection.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Geometry whose silhouettes need to be computed. Can be Brep, BrepFace, Mesh, or Extrusion.

params.name: silhouetteType
params.doc: Types of silhouette to compute.

params.name: viewport
params.doc: Projection.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: Tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. Surfaces and curves that are closer than tolerance, may be treated as projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAbsoluteTolerance.

params.name: angleToleranceRadians
params.doc: Angular tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. A surface normal N that satisfies N o cameraDirection < Sin(angleToleranceRadians) may be considered projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAngleToleranceRadians.

methods.name: Compute(GeometryBase, SilhouetteType, Point3d, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public static Silhouette[] Compute(GeometryBase geometry, SilhouetteType silhouetteType, Point3d perspectiveCameraLocation, double tolerance, double angleToleranceRadians)
methods.summary: Compute silhouettes of a shape for a perspective projection.

params.doc: Geometry whose silhouettes need to be computed. Can be Brep, BrepFace, Mesh, or Extrusion.

params.name: silhouetteType
params.doc: Types of silhouette to compute.

params.name: perspectiveCameraLocation
params.doc: Location of perspective camera.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: Tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. Surfaces and curves that are closer than tolerance, may be treated as projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAbsoluteTolerance.

params.name: angleToleranceRadians
params.doc: Angular tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. A surface normal N that satisfies N o cameraDirection < Sin(angleToleranceRadians) may be considered projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAngleToleranceRadians.

params.doc: Direction of parallel camera.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: Tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. Surfaces and curves that are closer than tolerance, may be treated as projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAbsoluteTolerance.

params.name: angleToleranceRadians
params.doc: Angular tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. A surface normal N that satisfies N o cameraDirection < Sin(angleToleranceRadians) may be considered projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAngleToleranceRadians.

methods.name: ComputeDraftCurve(GeometryBase, Double, Vector3d, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public static Silhouette[] ComputeDraftCurve(GeometryBase geometry, double draftAngle, Vector3d pullDirection, double tolerance, double angleToleranceRadians)
methods.summary: Computes draft curve silhouettes of a shape.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Geometry whose silhouettes need to be computed. Can be Brep, BrepFace, Mesh, or Extrusion.

params.name: draftAngle
params.doc: The draft angle in radians. Draft angle can be a positive or negative value.

params.name: pullDirection
params.doc: 3d direction for the mold to be pulled in, directed away from the object.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: Tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. Surfaces and curves that are closer than tolerance, may be treated as projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAbsoluteTolerance.

params.name: angleToleranceRadians
params.doc: Angular tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. A surface normal N that satisfies N o cameraDirection < Sin(angleToleranceRadians) may be considered projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAngleToleranceRadians.

methods.name: ComputeDraftCurve(GeometryBase, Double, Vector3d, Double, Double, CancellationToken)
methods.signature: public static Silhouette[] ComputeDraftCurve(GeometryBase geometry, double draftAngle, Vector3d pullDirection, double tolerance, double angleToleranceRadians, CancellationToken cancelToken)
methods.summary: Computes draft curve silhouettes of a shape.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Geometry whose silhouettes need to be computed. Can be Brep, BrepFace, Mesh, or Extrusion.

params.name: draftAngle
params.doc: The draft angle in radians. Draft angle can be a positive or negative value.

params.name: pullDirection
params.doc: 3d direction for the mold to be pulled in, directed away from the object.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: Tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. Surfaces and curves that are closer than tolerance, may be treated as projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAbsoluteTolerance.

params.name: angleToleranceRadians
params.doc: Angular tolerance to use for determining projecting relationships. A surface normal N that satisfies N o cameraDirection < Sin(angleToleranceRadians) may be considered projecting. When in doubt use RhinoDoc.ModelAngleToleranceRadians.

params.name: cancelToken
params.doc: Computation cancellation token.

properties.name: Curve
properties.summary: 3D curve representing the shape of the silhouette.

properties.name: GeometryComponentIndex
properties.summary: Gets the component index corresponding with this silhouette curve. This field is only set when the entire silhouette curve is part of some geometry component.

properties.name: SilhouetteType
properties.summary: Gets the type of this silhouette curve.
